title: Oil and Vinegar Set with Lemons
description:
Olio e aceto — oil and vinegar. We always have a set on our own table at home, and this one from our Praiano Collection is the style we reach for. Two small ceramic cruets sit together in a shared tray, connected by a yellow handle in the centre so you can carry the whole thing with one hand.

The cruets have a lovely round shape with small handles and lids glazed in a deep teal green. Each one is painted freehand with plump Amalfi lemons and green leaves on a teal background — the same lemon motif you see throughout our Praiano Collection. The tray base is white with green edges. Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare paint every piece individually, so you will notice the lemons on one cruet sit a little differently than on the other.

Fill one with your best olive oil, the other with vinegar — and set them in the middle of the table. The ceramic keeps the contents cool and the tray catches any stray drops. All glazes are food-safe, so these are made for real, everyday use, not just display.

Part of our Praiano Collection. Everything is handmade and hand-painted in small batches by artisans in Vietri sul Mare. Slight variations in colour and brushwork are completely normal.
excerpt: A ceramic oil and vinegar set with hand-painted lemons on teal. Two cruets in a shared tray. From our Praiano Collection.
seoTitle: Oil & Vinegar Set — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade ceramic oil and vinegar set with lemon motif, painted freehand in Vietri sul Mare. Food-safe. Praiano Collection by Ceramiche Da Mario.
